message:
fix: replace raw deflate with Zig WASM zlib compression for excalidraw uploads

The excalidraw.com upload was broken because upload.ts used Node.js
deflateRawSync (raw deflate, no header) but excalidraw's decompressData
expects pako.deflate format (zlib with 0x78 header + Adler-32 trailer).

Changes:
- Add wasm/src/compress.zig: manual zlib stored-block compressor
  (header + uncompressed deflate blocks + Adler-32 checksum) that
  produces valid RFC 1950/1951 output compatible with pako.inflate
- Export zlibCompress from WASM module (main.zig)
- Add zlibCompress TS wrapper in layout.ts
- Replace deflateRawSync with WASM zlibCompress in upload.ts, with
  Node.js deflateSync fallback when WASM is unavailable
- Add e2e upload roundtrip test that uploads, fetches, decrypts, and
  decompresses to verify the full pipeline produces valid excalidraw JSON
- Fix e2e test URL matching (text prefixed with "Excalidraw URL: ")
